name: Chocolate Chip Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
3. In a large bowl, measure all ingredients except the last three.
4. Blend on low speed for 1/2 minute, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
5. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping occasionally.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool cakes slightly before spreading with glaze made from remaining ingredients.
9. Heat remaining ingredients over low heat, stirring constantly until chocolate is melted and slightly cooled.
10. Spread glaze evenly over the cooled cake layers.
